message:
Add smart profile rotation with --auto flag

Implements intelligent profile selection for caam activate:
- Three algorithms: smart (multi-factor scoring), round_robin, random
- Smart algorithm considers health, cooldown, recency, plan type
- Human-readable explanations instead of raw numeric scores
- Filters out system profiles (_original, _backup_*)
- Integrates with cooldown tracking and health store

Usage: caam activate claude --auto

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
